data.content: Implementation review findings: 1. The leaderboard threshold logic in src/components/lease-audit-helpers.ts satisfies the requested behavior by filtering each per-step agent entry to at least 10 completed attempts and success rate greater than 25%, then computing ranked entries, mean/margin, and totalN from only that qualified set. 2. Regression coverage in src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts covers under-10 exclusion, 25%-or-lower exclusion, qualified-only margin/totalN, runner-up filtering, and omission when no qualified agents remain; the focused test file passes (33 tests). 3. Approval is blocked because the sanity gate 'bunx tsc --noEmit' fails outside this change at .next/types/validator.ts:394 with TS2344: route '/api/test/terminal-fixture' does not satisfy AppRouteHandlerRoutes. Returning to ready_for_implementation until the required typecheck gate passes.
